meta.title: Open Source - Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Explore our open-source projects: AI document intelligence, automation blueprints, templates, and community tools. All MIT licensed.

hero.title: Open source
hero.subtitle: Production-grade tools, templates, and blueprints - all under MIT license. We build in the open because good tools should be accessible to everyone.

spotlight.label: Flagship project
spotlight.title: DocIQ
spotlight.tagline: AI document intelligence engine for healthcare
spotlight.description: Open-source AI backend that reads, classifies, and extracts structured data from medical documents. Built for real-world clinical workflows with FHIR R4 compliance.
